'''Hallrin IV''' was an [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] in the [[Hallrin system/Legends|Hallrin system]]. The [[Stratis Games]], including the [[Multi-Sentient Unarmed Combat Rounds]], were held on Hallrin IV. [[Clyngunn]] represented the [[ZeHethbra]] in these Rounds.
